flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Antioch University fell 44% between 2021 and 2024 (137 → 77).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Antioch University fell 10% between 2017 and 2020 ($26.2k → $23.5k).
